properties.Bank Guidance: Need to ensure ESIGN is consented to prior to delivery of a notice required to be provided in writing (Adverse Action, TILA). Also must ensure reasonable demonstration from the customer that they have the ability to view and retain the notice in the form provided (email, online document portal). Otherwise required notices must be provided in a paper format.

properties.Bank Guidance: Relates directly to whether or not a Notice of Adverse Action must be sent to an applicant that has been declined for an incomplete application. If an NOI, that is in compliance with Reg B's requirements for an NOI, is sent to the applicant and the reason for adverse action is incomplete application, then a Notice of Adverse Action may not be required.
